results.description:
DESCRIPTION:THE OVERARCHING GOAL OF THIS PROJECT IS TO UNDERSTAND, PREDICT, AND CONTROL THE RELATIONSHIPS BETWEEN NATURAL SOIL MICROBIAL COMMUNITIES (SMCS) AND GENETICALLY ENGINEERED MICROBES (GEMS). SPECIFICALLY, THIS PROJECT WILL APPLY CURRENT UNDERSTANDING OF THE COMPOSITION OF NATURAL SMCS TO CREATE LABORATORY MODEL SMCS TO MEASURE THE SURVIVAL AND PERSISTENCE OF GEMS. ADDITIONALLY, THE PROJECT WILL ASSESS THE CAPACITY OF DOMINANT SMC PHYLOTYPES TO CONTROL THE SURVIVAL AND PERSISTENCE OF GEMS. 

ACTIVITIES:.SUBRECIPIENT:OUTCOMES:.
